---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for codebase-map
title: "[feat] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Thanks for taking the time to propose an improvement!
The more context you share about the underlying problem, the easier it is to
design a solution that fits the rest of the tool.
-->

## Problem statement

<!--
What are you trying to do that codebase-map does not support today?
Describe the pain, not the solution — for example:
"When I refactor a service, I cannot quickly see which PRs will be impacted."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
Concrete sketch of what you would like to see. CLI flag? New export format?
Config option? Be as specific as you can, but it is okay to leave design details open.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.
"I could do X manually" is a valid alternative — tell us how manual it is.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
Links to real-world codebases or PR scenarios, screenshots, references to
similar features in other tools, or data that shows why this matters.
-->

## Willing to contribute?

<!-- Optional — check any that apply. -->

- [ ] I am interested in implementing this myself
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I just want to flag the need
